_comment: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE — NOT real YouTube API data. All videoIds, channelIds, and metadata are fabricated for testing purposes only. Do NOT use in production or treat as real API responses. The channelId 'SAMPLEchan0000000000000' matches the test entry in trusted_youtube_channels.json so that mock-mode official-channel matching can be exercised.
